text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I've become a beautiful flower! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Come here! Why don't you stand next to me? I want us to experience this joy together. This is our win, after all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. Thank you for caring
for and training me with all your heart. I'm so glad
I met you!
